name: Soft Green Smoothie with Almond Mylk
intro: Creamy smoothies—I love them! With just enough sweetness from the pear and creaminess from the avocado, this smoothie is so soothing for the stomach. If you’re active and want a boost, you can add in some hemp powder, rice protein, or rice bran.

ingredients.item: handfuls of spinach, approx. 2½ oz (70 g)

method: Cut the cucumber and the pear into chunks. Scoop out the avocado. Blend all the ingredients to a smooth texture.
